transcript:
Speaker A: क्या कर रही हो? [What are you doing?] 
Speaker B: I am sleeping. "I'm sleeping" बोलना चाहिए। और थोड़ा formal बोलना हो तो "I'm getting some sleep" भी कह सकते हैं। [I am sleeping. You should say "I'm sleeping". And if you want to speak a bit more formally, you can also say "I'm getting some sleep".] 
Speaker A: अच्छा! ऐसा है क्या? मैं इंग्लिश कैसे सीखूं? [Oh! Is that so? How do I learn English?] 
Speaker B: मेरे साथ रोज़ सिर्फ 15 minutes practice करो। एक महीने में ही इंग्लिश सीख जाओगे। [Practice with me for just 15 minutes every day. You will learn English in just one month.] 
Speaker A: पर यह तो काफी महंगा होगा ना? [But this must be quite expensive, right?] 
Speaker B: बिल्कुल नहीं। सिर्फ एक रुपये में पूरी ऐप ट्राई कर सकते हो। [Not at all. You can try the whole app for just one rupee.] 
Speaker A: फिर ज्वाइन कैसे करूं? [Then how do I join?] 
Speaker B: 50 लाख से ज़्यादा लोग मेरे साथ इंग्लिश सीख रहे हैं। अभी MySivi ऐप डाउनलोड करो, इंग्लिश सीखना शुरू कर दो। [More than 50 lakh people are learning English with me. Download the MySivi app now and start learning English.] 
Speaker C: Install Now पे क्लिक करो और MySivi ऐप डाउनलोड करो। [Click on Install Now and download the MySivi app.]
on_screen_text:
kya kar rahe ho? [What are you doing?]
I am sleeping
bolna chahiye. [should say.]
Aur thoda formal bolna ho to I'm getting some sleep sakte hain. [And if you want to speak a bit more formally, you can say "I'm getting some sleep".]
Achha! [Oh!]

summary: An AI avatar corrects a human's English phrasing in a split-screen format to demonstrate the MySivi app. The ad promotes daily 15-minute practice sessions and highlights a ₹1 trial offer for premium access. It ends with a call to action to download the app.
